_comment: Digital Asset Links — proves the Android app and the website own each other, which is what lets the TWA run FULL-SCREEN with no browser URL bar. HOST THIS FILE AT THE ORIGIN ROOT: https://tlaba.github.io/.well-known/assetlinks.json  (NOT under /workbench/ — Chrome only checks the origin root). On GitHub Pages that means committing it to your USER-SITE repo `tlaba.github.io` at path `.well-known/assetlinks.json`. Replace the package_name and paste the SHA-256 fingerprint(s) Bubblewrap prints after `bubblewrap build`. If you use Play App Signing, add BOTH your upload-key fingerprint and the Play app-signing-key fingerprint.
